CompanyOverview:
Checkout is bringing to Visa a list of 15 new merchants representing an annual incremental PV of €55BN for Visa
Checkout has provided information on volumes from existing merchants that Visa does not capture today, representing an annual incremental PV of €29BN for Visa.
AlignmentGoals: Increase PV volumes on card rails - Capture incremental PV and net revenues for Visa.
